name: schema-registry-dag-schema-search-service
description: T198 SchemaSearchService — DATA_PIPELINE archetype. Full-text schema search. Returns matching schemas by type, version, domain. Tenant-scoped results only.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: full-text search via BuildSearchFilter, tenant-scoped results only, search by type/version/domain, read-only
Retrieve DATA_PIPELINE arch pattern + build-search-filter + tenant-scoped-search + full-text-schema-search patterns for T198
Break T198 into: receive type/version/domain query params → build search filter with tenantId → searchDocuments() via DATABASE → filter to tenant-scoped results → return matching schemas

Generate schema-search-service.service.ts — HTTP GET via DynamicController, uses BuildSearchFilter (DNA-2) with schemaType, version, domain as optional filters, tenantId always injected from ALS. NEVER returns cross-tenant results. searchDocuments() only — no raw query construction. Read-only — no mutations.
Named check validation: build_search_filter_used, tenant_id_from_als, cross_tenant_results_impossible, type_version_domain_optional_filters, read_only
Score generated code 0-100 against T198 iron rules: BuildSearchFilter usage, tenant isolation, search param flexibility, no raw query construction
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=build-search-filter+tenant-scoped+optional-params, rejected=raw-query-construction OR cross-tenant-leakage OR hardcoded-tenant-id. curriculumTier=1.
